title: runtime perf envelope
manager: The project once shipped a -20% / -40% performance regression without noticing, and v6's columnar-val journal rewrite is the next change big enough to do it again. Before any journal work, write the allowed-cost budget against the 6.0 graviton baseline and wire it into the perf-envelope workflow, so enabling-infra cost becomes a policed number that blocks a breaching PR rather than a vibe discovered three releases later.
cs: baseline = a post-6.0 graviton run (construct, unfixed transition, edges_between, walk throughput); per-case thresholds; the envelope check wires into the existing perf-envelope workflow; a breach blocks until justified. Precedes and gates Tjssm-756.
